zh.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg是Herman von Ravensberg的兒子，於1246年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可達瑟爾。他和Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1306年3月5日在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 哈莉可列福拉文斯格享年60歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫奧豪森馬利吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg是Herman von Ravensberg的儿子，于1246年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可達瑟爾。他和Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda至少有4个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1306年3月5日在德国福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 哈莉可列福拉文斯格享年60岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫奧豪森馬利吉。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg was born in 1246, in Dassel, Einbeck, Hanover, Prussia, Germany as the son of Herman von Ravensberg. He had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda. He died on 5 March 1306, in Ravensberg, Kleve, Kreis Halle, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 60, and was buried in Marienkirche, Oberhausen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg est né en 1246, à Dassel, Einbeck, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, fils de Herman von Ravensberg. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1306, à Ravensberg, Kleve, Kreis Halle, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Marienkirche, Oberhausen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg wurde 1246 in Dassel, Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland, als Sohn von Herman von Ravensberg geboren. Er hatte mit Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 5. März 1306 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Ravensberg, Kleve, Kreis Halle, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Marienkirche, Oberhausen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg è nato il nel 1246 nel Dassel, Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania come figlio di Herman von Ravensberg. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda. Morì il 5 marzo 1306, nel Ravensberg, Kleve, Kreis Halle, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Germania, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Marienkirche, Oberhausen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensbergは1246年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ハノバーエインベックダセルでHerman von Ravensbergの息子として生まれた。彼はHedwig zur Lippe und von Rhedaとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1306年3月5日にドイツフレイスタアト プレウssンプロヴィンズ ウエストファレンクレイス ハルクレブラベンスバーグで60歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンオバーハウセンマリーンキルチェにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg(은)는 1246년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 아이벡 다셀에서 Herman von Ravensberg의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 3월 5일 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 핼일 클브 레이븐스버그에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 오버하우센 마앵커체에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg nasceu em 1246, em Dassel, Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha filho de Herman von Ravensberg. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1306, em Ravensberg, Kleve, Kreis Halle, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Marienkirche, Oberhausen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg родился в 1246 г. в местности дассел, эинбекк, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия. Его отца звали Herman von Ravensberg. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda. Он умер 5 марта 1306 г. в местности равенсбирг, клив, крис холл, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности мариенкирч, обираусен, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Otto III. von Ravensberg nació en 1246, en Dassel, Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania como hijo de Herman von Ravensberg. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con Hedwig zur Lippe und von Rheda. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1306, en Ravensberg, Kleve, Kreis Halle, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Marienkirche, Oberhausen, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
